name: visual-direction-checkpoint
safety_limits: do not pretend the visual direction is approved automatically
do not generate implementation code from the checkpoint alone
forbidden_actions: declare design pass without explicit direction
replace user approval with inferred taste
human_approval_triggers: the task shifts from clarification to implementation
the user asks to lock a final visual direction without review
the task would require external asset generation
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill returns a read-only checkpoint
validations: audience is explicit or clearly marked missing
